com.pax.poslink.fullIntegration

Class InputAccount.CustomMACInformation

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.pax.poslink.fullIntegration.InputAccount.CustomMACInformation
  • Enclosing class:
    InputAccount

    public static class InputAccount.CustomMACInformation
extends java.lang.Object

    • Constructor Detail

      • CustomMACInformation

        public CustomMACInformation()

    • Method Detail

      • getKeyType

        public java.lang.String getKeyType()

      • setKeyType

        public void setKeyType(java.lang.String keyType)
        The type of the key which is used to calculate MAC value
        Parameters:
        keyType - 0 – TAK
        1 – DES DUKPT MAC
        2 – AES DUKPT MAC
        3 – HMAC

      • getWorkMode

        public java.lang.String getWorkMode()

      • setWorkMode

        public void setWorkMode(java.lang.String workMode)
        MAC calculation mode
        Parameters:
        workMode - 0 - ANSI X9.9
        1 - Hypercomm Fast Mode
        2 - ANSI X9.19.
        3 - SHA1 (HMAC Only)
        4 - SHA256 (HMAC Only)

      • getKeySlot

        public java.lang.String getKeySlot()

      • setKeySlot

        public void setKeySlot(java.lang.String keySlot)
        Key slot for encryption.
        Parameters:
        keySlot - For HMAC, can be empty or 1. Empty value means key slot 1 too.
        Other MAC types, it can be in range [1, 99].

      • getData

        public java.lang.String getData()

      • setData

        public void setData(java.lang.String data)
        Data to be encrypted.
        Parameters:
        data - Must be in hexadecimal format before hash.
        If hashing multiple strings, use “|” to separate.
        If need to hash sensitive card data, please use place holder in the format:
        ${VARIABLE_NAME}.
        VARIABLE_NAME valid values:
        All the VARIBLE in Custom Data, CUSTOMDATA – It can be a replacement for the data in Custom Data field.
